title: The Battle for Syrup Village Escalates
description: On pages 2–5, the battle for Syrup Village intensifies as the Straw Hats, Usopp, and the village’s defenders confront Kuro’s pirates.
scene: The quiet village becomes a battlefield, with Usopp’s lies turning into real courage and the Straw Hats forcing Kuro’s plan to unravel.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But I am not sure to be able to make sure that the government is able to do anything. I am not to do it. I am not to do it. I am not to do it. I am not. I am not. I am not. I am not. I am not to do it

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: "I'm not sure what the pirate with 100 plate fleet" for whom the bell tolls" *usop paste group* "out to the sea" *yosahu and Johnny* *sau enters* *The three chefs*

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Is the hypnotist still aftering us?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: No, I don't see him! Maybe we've lost him

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: He must be dream- ing if he thinks he can catch us in this forest!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: That's right! In the name of the USOPPP pirate group!!

summary: This part pushes the arc from conspiracy into open battle, testing Usopp’s courage and the Straw Hats’ trust in him.
